title: Pseudolycopodiella goyazensis
taxonomy: Pseudolycopodiella goyazensis is a species of lycopod, a type of small, club-moss-like plant. It belongs to the class Lycopodiopsida, which is a group of vascular plants that produce cones. Within the class, Pseudolycopodiella goyazensis is placed in the order Lycopodiales, a group of lycopods that are mostly found in tropical regions. The family Lycopodiaceae includes Pseudolycopodiella goyazensis, as well as other species of lycopods that are similar in appearance. This classification helps scientists understand the relationships and evolutionary history of Pseudolycopodiella goyazensis and other plants in its family.
uses: Pseudolycopodiella goyazensis has been reported to have potential medicinal uses, particularly in traditional medicine.
